message:
feat(trace): Add trace recorder and lab runtime improvements

Major additions to the async runtime infrastructure:
- New trace recorder module (src/trace/recorder.rs) for capturing
  execution traces during debugging and profiling
- Enhanced lab config and runtime with better initialization patterns
- Intrusive wheel timer improvements for more precise scheduling
- New repro test for MPSC blocking edge case investigation

This work advances the async runtime development toward production
readiness with better observability and diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
